algorithm: Dixon-Coles Poisson + xG blend + referee adjustment + in-play Bayesian
outputs: btts_prob — both teams to score probability
improvements_v2: P1: Dixon-Coles ρ=-0.05 correction (cross-validated on 1000 matches)
P2: Time-decay weighting in inline fallback (half-life 1 year)
P3: Separate home/away attack/defense strengths (serialized in PKL)
P4: xG-based strength adjustment (40% blend, 1291 matches 2022-2026)
P5: Referee goal factor adjustment (82.6% coverage, 3715 matches)
P6: In-play Bayesian update (conditional on current score + minute)
P7: Matrix normalization after Dixon-Coles correction
P8: Model calibration endpoint with Brier scores
limitations: xG data only available for 2022-2026 matches (29% of dataset)
In-play model assumes constant scoring rate (no momentum adjustment)
No odds movement or market efficiency features yet
